prompt: A dramatic dark-fantasy portrait of an elderly wizard standing in a stormy wasteland under a black, cloud-choked sky. He wears a tall, weathered pointed hat with a brown leather band and a tiny metal clasp, and a heavy dark blue-gray robe with wide sleeves. His face is mostly hidden in shadow beneath the hat brim, with long strands of glowing {argument name="accent hair color" default="electric blue"} hair peeking out at the sides and a very long flowing silver-white beard reaching down his chest. The wizard thrusts his left hand toward the camera in a powerful forced-perspective pose, fingers spread, conjuring a bright orb of blue-white magical energy in his palm with crackling lightning arcs wrapping around the hand and sleeve. In his right arm he clutches a large ancient leather spellbook with worn corners, metal fittings, embossed arcane markings on the cover, and a few pages visible. The background shows a barren dark landscape and exactly 1 prominent lightning bolt striking on the right side of the frame. Cinematic high-contrast lighting, hyper-detailed skin and fabric texture, moody photorealism, sharp focus on the hand and beard, intense fantasy atmosphere, centered composition, square crop.
translatedPrompt: 一张戏剧性的暗黑奇幻风格肖像，描绘了一位老法师站在黑色云层密布的暴风荒原上。他戴着一顶高耸、饱经风霜的尖顶帽，帽檐饰有棕色皮带和微型金属扣，身穿一件宽袖的深蓝灰色厚重长袍。他的脸大部分隐藏在帽檐下的阴影中，两侧露出长长的 {argument name="accent hair color" default="电光蓝"} 发丝，胸前垂着长长的银白色飘逸胡须。法师以强有力的强制透视姿势将左手伸向镜头，手指张开，掌心汇聚着一颗明亮的蓝白色魔法能量球，噼啪作响的闪电弧环绕着手部和袖口。他的右臂紧抱着一本巨大的古老皮质法术书，书角磨损，带有金属配件，封面上刻有神秘符号，隐约可见几页书页。背景展示了一片荒凉的暗色景观，画面右侧有一道醒目的闪电劈下。电影级高对比度光影，超精细的皮肤和织物纹理，情绪化的照片写实感，焦点清晰地聚焦于手部和胡须，浓郁的奇幻氛围，中心构图，方形裁剪。

breakdown.creativeCore: 风暴法师施展闪电：一个电影级、照片写实风格的奇幻提示词，用于生成带有风暴光影和噼啪作响魔法能量的戏剧性法师肖像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
